2026/05/18 19:00:18.527422098 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527431042 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527469570 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527470651 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527490441 {
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527491412 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527505604 new <- list()
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527506665 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527520546 new$width <- width
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527521277 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527536209 new$height <- height
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527538733 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527565062 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527565944 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527580726 new$title <- title
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527581537 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527594477 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527595198 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527617982 new$version <- version
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527620896 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527634366 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527635087 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527651272 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527651993 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527662990 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527671071 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527671843 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527683660 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527684341 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527698683 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527699434 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527742699 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527743630 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527757621 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527758412 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527772604 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527773385 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527790140 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527790811 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527805012 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527805793 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527818973 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527819975 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527839314 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527840005 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527854046 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527854777 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527874186 "default"))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527874847 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527892754 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527893625 }
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527903490 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527914156 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527915017 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527929078 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527929839 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527947536 }
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527948277 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527964381 }
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527965122 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527974116 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527984321 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.527985032 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528000265 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528001046 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528015117 }
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528015788 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528028658 old$family <- family
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528029379 }
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528041307 version <- old$version
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528042058 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528053926 "2.0")
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528061567 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528079153 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528097982 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528098763 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528113395 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528114186 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528130330 domain = NA)
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528131783 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528156670 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528157631 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528177651 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528178423 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528200636 invisible()
2026/05/18 19:00:18.528201437 }

FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.30sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f426d267b00>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-18T18:58:31Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-18T18:56:39Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-05-18T18:58:31Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-18T18:56:39Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']
